title: The Glass Prison
author: Barış Kısır
description: An architect imprisoned in the prison he designed must use his knowledge of its hidden secrets to survive a cartel-orchestrated prison break. Julian Voss built Blackstone Penitentiary to be inescapable. Now he's inmate #819, trapped inside his own creation. When cartel leader El Lobo forces him to chart an escape route through undocumented maintenance tunnels, Julian must navigate a web of betrayal, corruption, and violence to regain his freedom.
long_description:
Blackstone Penitentiary was Julian Voss's masterpiece — a state-of-the-art supermax built entirely of reinforced glass and steel, designed for total transparency and control. But when a corrupt business partner frames him for accepting bribes, Julian becomes inmate #819, locked inside the prison he designed.

Warden Meredith Cross runs a tight ship, but even she can't prevent the inevitable: cartel leader El Lobo has been planning a massive prison break for years, and he needs Julian's intimate knowledge of Blackstone's secrets — the undocumented maintenance tunnels, the structural flaws, the blind spots in the glass — to pull it off.

Caught between the cartel hunting him and the warden who blames him for the prison's failures, Julian must navigate a brutal escape through the tunnels beneath Blackstone. But freedom comes with a price. El Lobo doesn't leave loose ends, and Julian's former partner Marcus Shaw — the man who framed him — is waiting on the outside with a bullet.

The Glass Prison is a taut prison thriller about betrayal, survival, and the cages we build around ourselves.

characters.name: Julian Voss
characters.description: A brilliant architect who designed Blackstone Penitentiary. Framed for corruption and imprisoned in his own creation. Quiet, observant, methodical. Knows every weakness in the prison.

characters.name: El Lobo
characters.description: Cartel leader born Ricardo Fuentes. Charismatic, ruthless, and patient. Spent three years planning his escape from Blackstone. Will kill anyone who becomes a liability.

characters.name: Warden Meredith Cross
characters.description: Warden of Blackstone Penitentiary. A career corrections officer, hard but fair. Doesn't trust Julian but also doesn't trust the cartel. Follows procedure until procedure fails.

characters.name: Vargas
characters.description: El Lobo's lieutenant inside Blackstone. Lean, sharp, practical. Leads the extraction team during the prison break.

characters.name: Marcus Shaw
characters.description: Julian's former business partner. Framed Julian for bribes paid by El Lobo. Motivated by his wife's medical bills. Cowardly and guilt-ridden.

short_description: An architect framed and imprisoned inside his own glass supermax must survive a cartel escape plot.
